text: 4918 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "ثَلاَثٌ مَنْ تَكُنْ فِيهِ فَلاَ يُرْجَى خَيْرُهُ أَبَداً مَنْ لَمْ يَخْشَ اَللَّهَ فِي اَلْغَيْبِ وَ لَمْ يَرْعَوِ عِنْدَ اَلشَّيْبِ وَ لَمْ يَسْتَحِ مِنَ اَلْعَيْبِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4918 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"There are three traits in a person from whom no good can ever be expected: one who does not fear Allah (swt) in private, one who shows no restraint in old age, and one who feels no shame from committing faults."
